title: Clinical Trials & Drug Data Aggregator input

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Official US government APIs to query. All sources are JSON APIs and require no browser scraping.

query.title: Search query
query.description: General keyword used for selected sources. Examples: aspirin, diabetes, oncology, melanoma.

conditions.title: Trial conditions
conditions.description: Optional clinical trial condition terms, such as diabetes or breast cancer.

drugNames.title: Drug names
drugNames.description: Optional drug names for openFDA and trial searches.

maxResults.title: Maximum records
maxResults.description: Maximum clean non-personal records saved across all selected sources.

openFdaApiKey.title: openFDA API key
openFdaApiKey.description: Optional openFDA API key for higher rate limits. You may also set OPENFDA_API_KEY as an environment variable.

userAgent.title: User-Agent
userAgent.description: Descriptive User-Agent sent to official public APIs.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Not required for official JSON APIs, included for Apify compatibility.
